identity_baseline: A large, powerful Martian warrior and duelist.
stable_visual_summary: Zad is a big, hulking, and powerful Martian warrior characterized by a brute-like physical presence. He functions as a single-named duelist capable of wielding a long-sword. Despite his imposing size and strength, there is an implied lack of combat success within his own social hierarchy.
personality: Lacks the reputation of a successful killer among his own chieftains despite his physical prowess.
relationship_notes: Seen in conversation with Dejah Thoris.
continuity_constraints: Must maintain a "hulking" and "powerful" physical scale relative to other characters.
Should be depicted as capable of wielding a long-sword.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific clothing or armor details are not provided.
The relationship between the name "Zad" and the name "*o mad*" is unconfirmed (one is listed as an alias/name).
